name: ClawGuard Security Middleware
description: Outstanding security product that fills a critical gap in the OpenClaw ecosystem. Multi-layer security enforcement (shell+file+network) with YAML policy, deny-by-default, fail-closed on timeout, JSONL audit trail, human-in-the-loop approval. Available as npm package and Python SDK.
review: Outstanding security product that fills a critical gap in the OpenClaw ecosystem. Multi-layer security enforcement (shell+file+network) with YAML policy, deny-by-default, fail-closed on timeout, JSONL audit trail, human-in-the-loop approval. Available as npm package and Python SDK.
catalog_notes: Conditional approval. Author should add YAML frontmatter to openclaw-skill/skill.md and add root SKILL.md. Excellent security tool — actively maintained.
